title: Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam
tagline: Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam — spiritual town of Tamil Nadu

overview.short: Kothandaramar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to Rama, the seventh avatar of the god Vishnu.
overview.description: Kothandaramar Temple is a Hindu temple located in the Tiruvarur district of Tamil Nadu, India, dedicated to Rama, the seventh avatar of the god Vishnu. The temple is glorified by Maharishi Valmiki and classified as one of the 108 Abhimana Kshethrams of the Vaishnavate tradition. This temple one of Pancha Rama Kshethrams. All these temples are said to be particular locations mentioned in Ramayana.

topPlaces.name: Jambuvanodai
topPlaces.description: Jambuvanodai is a village in Muthupettai taluk, Thiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India, near Muthupet. In 2011, the village had a population of 3,839.

topPlaces.name: Nachikulam
topPlaces.description: Nachikulam is a village administered by the Udayamarthandapuram Panchayath in Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. ECR East Coast Road pass through this village.

topPlaces.name: Karpaganatharkulam Karpaganathar Temple
topPlaces.description: Karpaganatharkulam Karpaganathar Temple (கற்பகநாதர்குளம் கற்பகநாதர் கோயில்) is a Hindu temple located at Karpaganatharkulam in Tiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India. The temple is dedicated to Shiva, as the moolavar presiding deity, in his manifestation as Karpaganathar.

topPlaces.name: Muthupet
topPlaces.description: Muthupet is a panchayat town and taluk in the Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is also known as Pearlpet.

topPlaces.name: Sithamalli
topPlaces.description: Sithamalli is a village of Mannargudi Taluk in Tiruvarur district Tamil Nadu, India. Muthupet is a nearby town.

topPlaces.name: Reguramasamudram
topPlaces.description: Reguramasamudram is a village in the Pattukkottai taluk of Thanjavur district, Tamil Nadu, India.

items.note: Jambuvanodai is a village in Muthupettai taluk, Thiruvarur district, Tamil Nadu, India, near Muthupet. In 2011, the village had a population of 3,839.

Muthupet is a panchayat town and taluk in the Thiruvarur district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. It is also known as Pearlpet.
Sithamalli is a village of Mannargudi Taluk in Tiruvarur district Tamil Nadu, India. Muthupet is a nearby town.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Tiruchirappalli International Airport (100 km) and the nearest railway station is Tiruchirappalli Junction (104 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam?
faq.a: Stays in Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kothandarama Temple, Thillaivilagam?
faq.a: The top attractions are Jambuvanodai, Nachikulam, Karpaganatharkulam Karpaganathar Temple, Muthupet, Sithamalli.
